name: Frego & Associates
description_short: Frego & Associates is a credit building provider based in Dearborn Heights, Michigan. Rated 4.7/5 with 496 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Frego & Associates is a credit building provider serving clients in Dearborn Heights, Michigan. With 496 Google reviews and a 4.7/5.0 rating, Frego & Associates has built a significant presence in the local credit building market.

Frego & Associates specializes in credit building services designed to help consumers build or rebuild their credit history. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Credit building services like Frego & Associates in Dearborn Heights help consumers who are starting fresh or recovering from credit setbacks. The most effective credit building programs report to all three major credit bureaus and provide tools to track progress over time. When comparing providers, look for transparent pricing, no hidden fees, and verified reporting to Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion.

Consumers in the Dearborn Heights, Michigan area who are considering Frego & Associates should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit building provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
